notes: Official page verifies the Taroom Trough Development Plan and describes the trough as an onshore oil and gas region within the broader Bowen-Surat Basin. No reserve, volume or approval-completion value is published.

fields.region_description: Onshore oil and gas region within the broader Bowen-Surat Basin
